items.title: Ada Twist, Scientist
items.description: A young scientist and her friends use the scientific method to solve everyday mysteries.

items.title: Aladdin
items.description: A street urchin finds a magic lamp and wishes to become a prince to win a princess's heart.

items.title: Alma's Way
items.description: A Puerto Rican girl uses critical thinking to solve problems in her Bronx neighborhood.

items.title: Amphibia
items.description: A girl is transported to a world of amphibians and must find her way home.

items.title: Arthur
items.description: An aardvark named Arthur navigates everyday challenges with family and friends.

items.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
items.description: A young boy with elemental powers must master all four elements to save the world.

items.title: Babe
items.description: A pig raised by sheepdogs learns to herd sheep with kindness instead of intimidation.

items.title: Beat Bugs
items.description: Five bug friends navigate life in an overgrown backyard, with Beatles songs woven in.

items.title: Beauty and the Beast
items.description: A young woman is imprisoned by a beast in his castle, and learns to look beyond appearances.

items.title: Big City Greens
items.description: A mischievous country boy adjusts to life in the big city with his family.

items.title: Big Hero 6
items.description: A young robotics prodigy and his inflatable robot join a team of heroes to save their city.

items.title: Blue Planet II
items.description: David Attenborough returns to explore the world's oceans and the incredible creatures within.

items.title: Blue's Clues & You!
items.description: A live-action host and animated blue puppy solve puzzles and play games with the audience.

items.title: Bluey
items.description: An Australian Blue Heeler puppy who loves to play imaginative games with her family.

items.description: Short one-to-three minute episodes following Bluey and her family.

items.title: Brave
items.description: A Scottish princess must undo a curse she accidentally placed on her mother.

items.title: Carmen Sandiego
items.description: A master thief uses her skills for good, traveling the world to thwart a villainous organization.

items.title: Cars
items.description: A hotshot race car gets stranded in a small town and learns what really matters.

items.title: Charlie's Colorforms City
items.description: A girl creates stories using colorful shapes that come to life.

items.title: Chip and Potato
items.description: A pug starts kindergarten with her secret mouse friend in her pocket.

items.title: Coco
items.description: A boy journeys to the Land of the Dead to unlock the mystery behind his family's music ban.

items.title: Cocomelon
items.description: Animated nursery rhymes and songs for toddlers and preschoolers.

items.title: Curious George
items.description: A curious monkey and the Man in the Yellow Hat go on adventures that teach science and math.

items.title: Cyberchase
items.description: Kids travel to cyberspace to stop a villain using math and problem-solving.

items.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
items.description: Daniel Tiger and his friends learn social and emotional lessons in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

items.title: Doc McStuffins

items.title: Donkey Hodie
items.description: A determined donkey and her best friend learn perseverance and problem-solving.

items.description: A Latina girl and her monkey friend go on adventures, teaching kids Spanish and problem-solving.

items.description: Scrooge McDuck and his grandnephews go on globe-trotting treasure hunts.

items.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
items.description: A lonely boy befriends a gentle alien stranded on Earth and helps him find his way home.

items.title: El Deafo

items.description: In a city where fire, water, land, and air residents live together, a fiery woman and a go-with-the-flow guy discover they have more in common than they thought.

items.description: A brave Latina princess learns to rule her kingdom with kindness and compassion.

items.description: A young Colombian woman must face the frustration of being the only member of her family without magical powers.

items.title: Finding Dory
items.description: Dory the forgetful fish sets out to find her parents with help from Nemo and Marlin.

items.title: Finding Nemo
items.description: After his son is captured, a timid clownfish sets out on a journey across the ocean to rescue him.

items.title: Firebuds
items.description: A boy and his fire truck best friend go on adventures helping their community.

items.title: Frozen
items.description: A fearless princess sets off on a journey to find her estranged sister whose icy powers have trapped the kingdom.

items.description: Elsa and Anna embark on a dangerous journey to discover the origin of Elsa's magical powers.

items.description: A girl and her hamster get superpowers from aliens and protect their city.

items.description: An optimistic squirrel and her bunny best friend navigate daily life and adventures.

items.description: A brilliant young girl develops telekinetic powers and stands up to cruel adults.

items.description: Mickey and friends go on adventures to fantastical lands with their magical playhouse.

items.description: Snoopy and Woodstock fulfill their dreams of becoming NASA astronauts.

items.description: An optimistic sea sponge and his friends have ridiculous adventures in an underwater city.

items.description: Young Jedi learn the ways of the Force and go on exciting missions.

items.description: Three siblings learn mindfulness and compassion from their wise panda neighbor.

items.title: StoryBots
items.description: Animated characters answer kids' biggest questions about the world.

items.title: Strange World
items.description: A family of explorers ventures into an uncharted, treacherous land beneath the surface.

items.description: When a young boy vanishes, a small town uncovers a mystery involving secret experiments and supernatural forces.

items.description: Four mutant turtles trained in ninjutsu protect New York City from villains.

items.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
items.description: An upbeat girl befriends a grumpy ghost who is cursed to haunt her.

items.title: The Incredibles
items.description: A family of superheroes living undercover are forced out of retirement to save the world.

items.title: The Jungle Book
items.description: A boy raised by wolves must journey to a human village with the help of animal friends.

items.description: A young lion prince flees his kingdom only to learn the true meaning of responsibility and bravery.

items.title: The Little Mermaid
items.description: A mermaid princess makes a deal with a sea witch to become human and pursue love.

items.description: Ms. Frizzle's sister takes the class on wild science field trips in the Magic School Bus.

items.description: A legendary monster hunter's life is turned upside down when a young girl stows away on his ship.

items.description: A Kansas girl is swept away to a magical land and must find her way home.

items.description: Mickey and friends embark on comedic adventures in a cartoon world.

items.description: The toys are mistakenly delivered to a day care center and must plan their escape.

items.description: Woody and the gang go on a road trip with Bonnie's new toy Forky.

items.description: A six-year-old boy and his best friend, a giant trash truck, go on adventures.

items.description: A teenager discovers a magical amulet that chose him to be the first human Trollhunter.

items.title: Wild Kratts
items.description: Animated brothers Martin and Chris Kratt explore animal habitats and learn about wildlife.

items.description: A video game villain wants to be a hero and ventures into other games to change his fate.
